# Scenario: session.status retry shows error badge in chat buffer
#
# When the server encounters an internal error, it sends session.status
# events with type=retry.  Each retry should show an error badge in the
# chat buffer.  When the session recovers (busy/idle), the badge is cleared.

:session ses_retry_test
:directory /tmp/test-retry

:api GET /session/ses_retry_test/message 200 [{"info":{"id":"msg_user1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","role":"user","time":{"created":500000}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_u1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","messageID":"msg_user1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":500000,"end":500001}}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"world","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}]}]

:api GET /session/ses_retry_test 200 {"id":"ses_retry_test","slug":"test","projectID":"proj1","directory":"/tmp/test-retry","title":"Retry Test","version":"1.0.0","time":{"created":500000,"updated":1000002}}

:api GET /session/ses_retry_test/todo 200 []
:api GET /session/ses_retry_test/diff 200 []

# Session becomes busy
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_retry_test","status":{"type":"busy"}}}
:assert-busy

# Assistant starts streaming
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc123"}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1000001}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_retry_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"wor","time":{"start":1000001}},"delta":"wor"}}
:assert-contains wor

# First retry — Internal server error
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_retry_test","status":{"type":"retry","attempt":1,"message":"Internal server error","next":9999999999999}}}
:assert-busy
:assert-contains Internal server error
:assert-contains attempt 1

# Second retry — replaces the first badge
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_retry_test","status":{"type":"retry","attempt":2,"message":"Internal server error","next":9999999999999}}}
:assert-busy
:assert-contains attempt 2

# Server recovers — session goes idle, badge is cleared
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_retry_test","status":{"type":"idle"}}}
:sse {"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_retry_test"}}
:assert-idle
:assert-not-contains Internal server error
:assert-contains world
